## resolveScopeKeys

<GenerationInfo sourceFile="packages/ratelimit/src/utils/keys.ts" sourceLine="314" packageName="@commandkit/ratelimit" />

Resolve keys for multiple scopes, dropping unresolvable ones.

```ts title="Signature"
function resolveScopeKeys(params: Omit<ResolveScopeKeyParams, 'scope'> & {
    scopes: RateLimitScope[];
  }): ResolvedScopeKey[]
```
